expectations.text: Identifies Phi-3 as a decoder-only LLM / generative model.
expectations.evidence: Quote: 'Phi-3 is a generative decoder-only LLM, and that whole family (GPT, LLaMA, Phi, Mistral, Qwen, Stable Diffusion, seq2seq generators) is explicitly out of scope.'

expectations.text: Clearly states this model is NOT supported / out of scope for the winml pipeline today (not hedged).
expectations.evidence: Quote: 'Short version: WinML ModelKit can not do this yet.' + 'explicitly out of scope for the current pipeline.'

expectations.text: Does NOT walk the user through export/optimize/quantize/compile/build.
expectations.evidence: No winml build pipeline commands recommended.

expectations.text: Mentions LLM support is on the roadmap OR suggests a legitimate alternative.
expectations.evidence: Both: 'late 2026' roadmap + OpenVINO GenAI / ONNX Runtime GenAI / DirectML alternatives. Notes 'None of those go through winml.'

expectations.text: All `winml` commands quoted in the response are runnable -- every flag exists in `winml <cmd> --help`, no positional model arg where the CLI is flag-only.
expectations.evidence: All ? winml commands verified runnable against --help.
